full_text:
Zhao Yan (Boran) 趙儼 (伯然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Yan (趙儼), styledBoran (伯然), was born in Yingchuan. Strictly enforced the law on everyone, sent to settle arguments among Hefei commanders. Zhao Yan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhao Yan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
